summary: Iteration 8 - Complete testing of Unified Login and Add to Calendar (ICS) features. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Unified login endpoint correctly identifies admin vs customer and returns appropriate role
ICS file contains correct parlour details (title, location, parlour phone 09500673208)
ICS file does NOT contain customer phone number - correctly excluded
Add to Calendar button only shows for pending/confirmed appointments
Phone-based login for customers works via unified login endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Login feature verified - admin login via /login page redirects to /admin/dashboard, customer login redirects to /dashboard. Phone-based login works. ICS calendar file contains correct parlour details (title: Lotus Beauty Parlour Appointment, location: 3/41, East Street, Main Road, Puthumanai, Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu 627120, parlour phone: 09500673208). Customer phone is NOT in ICS file. Add to Calendar button appears on pending/confirmed appointments.

details: Admin can login via /login page with email

'Admins can also log in here' note visible on login page

coverage: TestUnifiedLogin - 5 tests for unified login endpoint (admin email, customer email, customer phone, invalid credentials, wrong password)
